name: Data Analytics Foundations
description: A first course in analytics concepts, decision framing, and basic data workflows.

name: Statistics for Decision Making
description: Probability, inference, regression, and uncertainty for management decisions.

name: Python for Analytics
description: Python programming for analytics, data cleaning, and reproducible analysis.

name: Database Systems for Analytics
description: Relational databases, SQL, data modeling, and analytics data pipelines.

name: Machine Learning Applications
description: Applied machine learning models, evaluation, and management use cases.

name: Optimization and Decision Models
description: Optimization models and decision support for operations and analytics.

name: Data Visualization and BI
description: Dashboards, visual storytelling, and business intelligence workflows.

name: AI Engineering Studio
description: Build and evaluate AI-enabled analytics systems with deployment-oriented practices.

name: Responsible AI and Governance
description: Risk, accountability, governance, and responsible deployment of AI systems.

name: Analytics Capstone Project
description: A supervised capstone project integrating analytics, communication, and implementation.
